CustomField.description: Admin-written plain-text coaching guidance for Penny. Written TO Penny, not to learners. Distinct from Mission_Brief__c which is written for learners.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Admin-written plain-text coaching guidance for Penny. Written TO Penny, not to learners. Distinct from Mission_Brief__c which is written for learners.
CustomField.label: Penny Context
